input: INVITATION: The Springfield Chamber of Commerce cordially invites you to our Spring Gala on Friday, April 11, 2025 at 7:00 PM. Location: Grand Ballroom, Marriott Downtown, 100 Main Street. Black tie. Tickets: $150 per person, $250 per couple. RSVP by March 28.

input: Save the Date! Johnson & Williams Law Firm Annual Charity Golf Tournament. June 14, 2025. Tee time: 8:00 AM. Pine Valley Golf Club, 300 Fairway Drive. Entry fee: $200 per player. Includes lunch and awards ceremony. Contact: events@jwlaw.com.

input: Free Community Health Fair! When: Saturday, February 8, 2025, 9 AM to 3 PM. Where: Lincoln Community Center, 200 Oak Avenue. Free blood pressure screenings, flu shots, and health consultations. Organized by the City Health Department.

Book Club Meeting - We're reading 'The Great Gatsby' this month. Discussion on Wednesday, March 5, 2025 at 6:30 PM. Meeting at Barnes & Noble, 2nd floor cafe, Elm Street location. Free to attend. Hosted by Downtown Readers Circle.

input: New Year's Eve Bash 2025! December 31, 2025. Doors open at 8 PM, countdown at midnight. The Rooftop Lounge, 500 Broadway, 40th Floor. General admission $75, VIP $150 (open bar). DJ Marcus spinning all night. Produced by Nightlife Events Co.

Weekly Farmers Market every Saturday from May through October, 7:00 AM to 12:00 PM. Town Square, corner of Main and First. Fresh produce, baked goods, crafts. Free entry. Managed by the Local Growers Association.

The PTA is hosting a bake sale fundraiser outside the school gym on March 14th from 3-5pm. All proceeds go to the 8th grade field trip fund. Volunteers needed! Contact Lisa at lisam@email.com
Running club meets every Wed at 6am, rain or shine. We start from the Starbucks on King St. All paces welcome. Free. Just show up! 🏃
Trivia night @ O'Malley's Pub, Thurs 8pm. Teams of up to 6. $10/person, winner takes the pot. Hosted by QuizMaster Dan. 21+ only. Reserve tables at omalleyspub.com

Come to our open mic BUT ALSO there's a poetry slam happening in the back room at the same time. Main stage starts at 7, slam starts at 8:30. The Velvet Note, 42 Jazz Alley. $5 cover for open mic, $8 for slam, or $10 for both. Every first Friday.

The 5K Turkey Trot is back! Thanksgiving morning, November 27, 2025. Registration opens at 6:30 AM, race starts at 8:00 AM. Start/finish line at City Hall. Early bird: $25 (before Nov 1), regular: $35, day-of: $45. Kids 12 and under run free. Proceeds benefit the Local Food Bank. Organized by the Rotary Club.
